# cmccloudv2_redis_backup (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# create redis backup
resource "cmccloudv2_redis_backup" "backup1" {
    instance_id   = "2dfb8590-73cb-4661-9c18-94e0d83722af"
    name          = "redis-backup1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) redis instance id
- `name` (String) Name of the backup

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Created time
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `size` (Number) Size in bytes of backup

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
